hero_subtitle: Bridging the gap between pure mathematics, computer science, and real-world engineering to guide the next generation of analytical minds.

about_page.journey_p1: My path to education is built on a foundation of rigorous engineering and pure science. After earning my degree in Shipbuilding Engineering from Istanbul Technical University (ITU), I worked as a designer and engineer on dozens of yacht projects until 2016. Driven by a deep passion for fundamental sciences, I then pivoted my career toward academia.
about_page.journey_p2: This drive led me to Middle East Technical University (METU), where I completed a double major in Mathematics and Computer Engineering. I am currently continuing my academic journey there as a Ph.D. student in Mathematics.
about_page.journey_p3: Since transitioning to education, I have had the privilege of guiding over 100 students in achieving top ranks and maximizing their academic potential. I bring this multifaceted engineering and theoretical perspective into every lesson I teach.
about_page.journey_p4: Having served as an executive in corporate firms for many years and founded my own manufacturing and yacht design companies, my mission extends beyond academic success. I strive to mentor my students, equipping them with a broader vision and strategic mindset for their future professional lives. Underlying all my teaching is a deep commitment to cultivating a mindset aligned with positive global values.
about_page.beyond_p1: Currently based in Ankara, Türkiye, I also believe that a sharp mind requires a balanced life. When I am not tutoring or coding in Python and Java, I immerse myself in the world of social Latin dances, practicing Kizomba and Bachata regularly.
about_page.beyond_p2: I am an avid reader of philosophy, particularly Stoicism, and hold a deep fascination for ancient history. Whether I am capturing moments through photography or exploring new ideas, I approach life with the same curiosity I bring to mathematics.

tutoring_page.giving_back_text: I deeply believe that quality education should be accessible. Subject to my schedule and availability, I provide completely free tutoring sessions for orphaned students. If you or a student you know is in this situation, please do not hesitate to reach out—simply sending a message is enough.
tutoring_page.exam_flexible_desc: Offering both 1-on-1 individual and group sessions. Choose between an 8-week accelerated crash course or a comprehensive 16-week standard program tailored to your exam timeline.
tutoring_page.exam_mock_desc: Every student receives 5 free mock exams simulating real test conditions, followed by comprehensive result evaluation reports to pinpoint areas for improvement.
tutoring_page.exam_strategic_desc: Includes personalized homework and guided solving sessions. Students master the effective use of TI and Desmos calculators, saving crucial time during exams.
tutoring_page.exam_guarantee_desc: Start with a completely Free Trial Lesson to experience the methodology firsthand. I stand by a strict Success Guarantee for students who complete the required program milestones.
tutoring_page.stem_intro_desc: I specialize in providing high-quality, structured tutoring for high school and university students across international curricula. My approach focuses on deep conceptual understanding and rigorous problem-solving.
tutoring_page.box_ap_cs: Computer Science: Computer Science A, Computer Science Principles
tutoring_page.box_ib_math: Mathematics: Analysis and Approaches (AA), Applications and Interpretation (AI) - HL & SL
tutoring_page.box_sat_math: Mathematics: Comprehensive SAT Math preparation, advanced problem-solving, and timing strategies.
tutoring_page.box_uni_math_core: Core Calculus & Analysis: Calculus I-II-III (Multivariable), Advanced Calculus, Real Analysis, Complex Analysis
tutoring_page.box_uni_math_algebra: Algebra & Geometry: Linear Algebra, Abstract Algebra, Differential Geometry
tutoring_page.box_uni_math_applied: Applied & Engineering Math: Ordinary & Partial Differential Equations (ODE & PDE), Numerical Analysis, Engineering Mathematics, Probability & Statistics
tutoring_page.box_uni_cs_core: Core CS & Theory: Data Structures, Algorithm Design, Automata Theory, Discrete Mathematics
tutoring_page.box_uni_cs_systems: Systems & Hardware: Database Systems, Computer Architecture, Circuit Design

contact_page.intro: Whether you're looking for tutoring, academic collaboration, or just want to discuss mathematics and computer science, feel free to reach out.
